chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3625 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A 732/19 22.01.2019 Mr. Muhammad Hassan Chandio advocate for petitioners...... Urgency granted. Learned counsel for the petitioners is present alongwith petitioners and does not press this petition on the ground that the subject case has been disposed of under “C” class. Accordingly, this petition stands dismissed as not pressed in the light of above. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
